risks.risk: Broad UI or wording changes can regress active AP Math workflows.
risks.guard: Use apmath-static-app-sop and explicit file scope.

risks.risk: Schema, migration, scope, or deploy mistakes can affect operating data.
risks.guard: No remote D1/deploy/schema changes without explicit task approval.

risks.risk: Root tasks can accidentally overwrite subordinate generated outputs or memory.
risks.guard: Follow textbook BOOT and protect generated outputs.

risks.risk: Student resubmit or parent-facing wording regressions can leak or corrupt outcomes.
risks.guard: Preserve OMR no-edit policy and parent wording checks.

risks.risk: Money history and internal notes require auditability.
risks.guard: Prefer status changes over deletion and restrict internal memo exposure.

risks.risk: Draft, staging, active, and classroom field flows can be confused.
risks.guard: Use timetable-attendance-classroom-sop and verify state semantics.
